'''Solibus IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mission to Solibus IV|visited]] by [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] during her [[Padawan/Legends|apprenticeship]] to [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]. It was there that the two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] would open the [[Shu-Wang Prism]] and solve the [[Lodi|Mystery of the Lodi]].
